name: 03 - Eval Quality
description: Quality dashboards: gatekeeper signals for the gateway. Reads only from the Postgres control plane (eval_scores, provider_credentials, users, virtual_keys). ClickHouse-native joins are simulated here by aggregating the eval_scores table that the eval_worker writes back to Postgres after each run.

native.query: SELECT provider, name, base_url, enabled, created_at FROM provider_credentials ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

cards.name: Recent eval scores (avg by metric, last 7d)

native.query: SELECT metric, round(avg(score)::numeric, 3) AS avg_score, count(*) AS samples FROM eval_scores WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY metric
SELECT u.email, u.role, u.created_at FROM users u ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT id, name, key_prefix, rpm_limit, monthly_budget_usd, revoked, created_at FROM virtual_keys ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT actor, action, target_id, created_at FROM audit_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
